findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem postcomp_homeomorph|theorem transport" TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/AmbientIsotopicNaturality.lean` shows line 55 and line 66 both prove `AmbientIsotopic ((h : C(Y, Z)).comp f) ((h : C(Y, Z)).comp g)`, with line 68 implemented as `hfg.postcomp_homeomorph h`.
findings.fix: Remove `AmbientIsotopic.transport` and use `AmbientIsotopic.postcomp_homeomorph` as the relation-level theorem; keep `AmbientIsotopy.transport` for the witnessing construction.
findings.issue: `AmbientIsotopic.transport` has the identical statement to `AmbientIsotopic.postcomp_homeomorph` immediately above, creating parallel public API for the same theorem.

summary: The main naturality lemmas are new, but the PR also adds an exact duplicate public declaration for the same relation-level postcomposition theorem.
